## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Aembit and GrowthX to discuss content creation progress, workflow improvements, and next steps.](https://fathom.video/share/wft4Tsfi_4ZXAs1TsaSZzggcx3Cmbywy?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX is refining their content creation process using Atlas, aiming to better capture Aembit's voice and technical accuracy](https://fathom.video/share/wft4Tsfi_4ZXAs1TsaSZzggcx3Cmbywy?tab=summary&timestamp=6.0)
  - [New artifacts (glossary, knowledge base) are being incorporated to improve content quality and consistency](https://fathom.video/share/wft4Tsfi_4ZXAs1TsaSZzggcx3Cmbywy?tab=summary&timestamp=8.0)
  - [Repurposing existing Aembit content (webinars, videos) is a promising avenue for scaling content production](https://fathom.video/share/wft4Tsfi_4ZXAs1TsaSZzggcx3Cmbywy?tab=summary&timestamp=13.0)
  - [Performance tracking and SEO impact analysis need to be more prominently discussed in future meetings](https://fathom.video/share/wft4Tsfi_4ZXAs1TsaSZzggcx3Cmbywy?tab=summary&timestamp=16.0)

## Topics

### Content Creation Workflow Improvements

  - [GrowthX is using Atlas (their content operating system) to incorporate various LLMs and Aembit-specific knowledge](https://fathom.video/share/wft4Tsfi_4ZXAs1TsaSZzggcx3Cmbywy?tab=summary&timestamp=397.0)
  - [Voice memo feedback from Aembit team is being used to guide article creation, showing promising results](https://fathom.video/share/wft4Tsfi_4ZXAs1TsaSZzggcx3Cmbywy?tab=summary&timestamp=591.0)
  - [A comprehensive knowledge base is being built, incorporating Aembit's glossary and documentation](https://fathom.video/share/wft4Tsfi_4ZXAs1TsaSZzggcx3Cmbywy?tab=summary&timestamp=711.0)
  - [Goal is to achieve 80-90% accuracy in initial drafts, reducing need for manual edits](https://fathom.video/share/wft4Tsfi_4ZXAs1TsaSZzggcx3Cmbywy?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)

### Content Review and Feedback Process

  - [Aembit team should continue providing feedback via comments rather than direct edits](https://fathom.video/share/wft4Tsfi_4ZXAs1TsaSZzggcx3Cmbywy?tab=summary&timestamp=856.0)
  - [GrowthX is incorporating all feedback into artifacts and workflows for continuous improvement](https://fathom.video/share/wft4Tsfi_4ZXAs1TsaSZzggcx3Cmbywy?tab=summary&timestamp=875.0)
  - [Two articles ready for final review: "How to Distinguish Between Human and Non-Human" and "Machine IAM"](https://fathom.video/share/wft4Tsfi_4ZXAs1TsaSZzggcx3Cmbywy?tab=summary&timestamp=533.0)

### Repurposing Existing Content

  - [GrowthX created a blog post from Ashur's webinar as a test case](https://fathom.video/share/wft4Tsfi_4ZXAs1TsaSZzggcx3Cmbywy?tab=summary&timestamp=1517.0)
  - [Dan shared additional webinar/video content for potential repurposing](https://fathom.video/share/wft4Tsfi_4ZXAs1TsaSZzggcx3Cmbywy?tab=summary&timestamp=1783.0)
  - [This approach could efficiently scale content production while maintaining Aembit's voice and expertise](https://fathom.video/share/wft4Tsfi_4ZXAs1TsaSZzggcx3Cmbywy?tab=summary&timestamp=1604.0)

### Performance Tracking and SEO Impact

  - [GrowthX to provide a dashboard showing content performance metrics (impressions, keywords, clicks)](https://fathom.video/share/wft4Tsfi_4ZXAs1TsaSZzggcx3Cmbywy?tab=summary&timestamp=1681.0)
  - [Future discussions to focus more on performance analysis, identifying successful themes and content types](https://fathom.video/share/wft4Tsfi_4ZXAs1TsaSZzggcx3Cmbywy?tab=summary&timestamp=1712.0)
  - [Both micro (individual piece) and macro (overall growth) perspectives to be considered](https://fathom.video/share/wft4Tsfi_4ZXAs1TsaSZzggcx3Cmbywy?tab=summary&timestamp=1716.0)

### Content Standardization

  - [David to adjust image colors for brand consistency](https://fathom.video/share/wft4Tsfi_4ZXAs1TsaSZzggcx3Cmbywy?tab=summary&timestamp=1890.0)
  - [Deckhead length and other formatting elements to be standardized across articles](https://fathom.video/share/wft4Tsfi_4ZXAs1TsaSZzggcx3Cmbywy?tab=summary&timestamp=1913.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Aembit to review highlighted section in new article draft, focusing on accuracy and voice](https://fathom.video/share/wft4Tsfi_4ZXAs1TsaSZzggcx3Cmbywy?tab=summary&timestamp=1055.0)
  - [GrowthX to incorporate Aembit's glossary and documentation into the knowledge base](https://fathom.video/share/wft4Tsfi_4ZXAs1TsaSZzggcx3Cmbywy?tab=summary&timestamp=711.0)
  - [David to update article images for brand consistency](https://fathom.video/share/wft4Tsfi_4ZXAs1TsaSZzggcx3Cmbywy?tab=summary&timestamp=1908.0)
  - [GrowthX to share performance dashboard and incorporate more performance discussion in future meetings](https://fathom.video/share/wft4Tsfi_4ZXAs1TsaSZzggcx3Cmbywy?tab=summary&timestamp=1767.0)
  - [GrowthX to continue refining Atlas workflow and share updated article drafts by end of week](https://fathom.video/share/wft4Tsfi_4ZXAs1TsaSZzggcx3Cmbywy?tab=summary&timestamp=1476.0)
  - [Both teams to explore opportunities for repurposing existing Aembit content](https://fathom.video/share/wft4Tsfi_4ZXAs1TsaSZzggcx3Cmbywy?tab=summary&timestamp=1576.0)
